data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for reversal/chargeback-aware commission adjustments.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Reversal/chargeback-aware commission adjustments', but there is no evidence provided that directly addresses this requirement. The prior steps focus on various aspects of the booking and member management processes but do not include any checks or validations related to commission adjustments in the context of reversals or chargebacks. This indicates a gap in the coverage of the specified requirement, leading to an inconclusive verdict.
gaps: No evidence of validation for reversal/chargeback-aware commission adjustments.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
